summary: Etap intercepted runInferenceTranscript and returned correct warning text, but Notion frontend did NOT render it. Content-Type mismatch is the root cause.

etap_response.body: {"type":"success","completion":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다."}

results.warning_text_in_response: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

diagnosis.root_cause: Content-Type mismatch: Etap returns application/json but Notion expects application/x-ndjson streaming format
diagnosis.secondary_issue: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on 3 related API calls — Etap may be closing connections for non-target requests
diagnosis.recommendation: Change Etap response Content-Type to application/x-ndjson and ensure response body ends with newline (NDJSON format). Also investigate why getInferenceTranscriptsForUser, warmScriptAgentDynamicModuleCache, markInferenceTranscriptSeen connections are being closed.
